title: This NEVER Happened Before: 16.8 Million Views: Why This Wild UFO Video Is Driving Everyone Insane
UFO and UAP Expert Urges Government to Provide Whistleblowers Legal Protection From Threats and Retribution
description: Space policy expert Mike Gold stresses the importance of legal protections for whistleblowers to ensure transparency in UFO and UAP investigations.

title: 'Not a Natural Phenomenon': Venezuela Earthquake Sparks UFO Theory After 'Red Energy Beams' Were Seen Before Disaster
description: Viral videos showing red beams before the Venezuela earthquake have sparked conspiracy theories. However, analyses reveal no credible evidence linking the footage to the seismic event.

title: Luis Elizondo denies allegation he was tied to UAP secrecy efforts
